aiReporting.placeholder: Ask a question about your business data...
aiReporting.attachmentTooMany: You can attach up to {{max}} files.

aiReporting.attachmentTotalTooLarge: Attached file content cannot exceed {{max}} characters in total.
aiReporting.attachmentReadFailed: One or more files could not be read.
aiReporting.messageTooLong: The message and attachments exceed {{max}} characters.

aiReporting.noSessionsDescription: Start a new conversation to analyze your business data.
aiReporting.emptyPlaceholderBody: Start with a question about your business data and I will help you with a useful answer.

aiReporting.footerHint: Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line.
